examples: Both women wept at his graveside.
He paid his last respects by standing quietly at the graveside.
Thee mourners dispersed from the graveside in groups of twos and threes.
El Dia Del Muerto is primarily known in Mexico and is celebrated graveside with family and friends.
With plenty of singing and dancing, some graveside chicken mole (or another favourite dish of the deceased) and a shot or two of tequila, it is an experience that's as moving as it is magical.
